Tekst:

Moje laŇĺi sve su gore,
Progone te nońáne more,
Zbog mene tvoja mladost vene.

Nońá je mlada, ńćeka vraga,
Ti me cimaŇ°, slutiŇ°
da ńáeŇ° da se kidaŇ°,
A ja na to se primam.

Inat, tvoj veńćni je saveznik,
Ti moraŇ° nisko da vratiŇ° mi.
Koja nońáas bińáe deŇĺurna na satnici,
Ti probaj duŇ°o pa mi javi.

Gotovo opet,
LaŇĺeŇ° sebe, kaŇĺeŇ° da je gotovo.
ZnaŇ° da ne moŇĺeŇ° bez mene,
ZvańáeŇ° ponovo,
S' njom da probaŇ°, shvati bilo bi ti dosadno, dosadnooo.
Otrovno, tebe radi samo divlje, neukrotivo,
Ne sme drugo muŇ°ko ńćak ni da me pogleda.
Nismo ludi, to je samo naŇ°a pato-patologija,
Patologija...
A kada ostanemo sami, ego mi nahrani.

Ko je ona, gde je poŇ°la,
Zna li kuńćka, ovde 
nije dobrodoŇ°la?
To ńáe puno da je koŇ°ta.

BaŇ° je slatka, suknja kratka,
Tebe vreba, sluti da ńáeŇ° da se predaŇ°,
A zna li ona da te ne dam?

Inat tvoj, veńćni je saveznik,
Ti moraŇ° nisko da vratiŇ° mi.
Koja nońáas bińáe deŇĺurna na satnici,
Ti probaj duŇ°o pa mi javi.

snippet.title: Dubioza Kolektiv - Space Song feat. Earl Sixteen (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Album: #fakenews (Menart, 2020)
Stream Space Song - https://backl.ink/146903469
Stream #fakenews -  https://backl.ink/102965970

Video production: Fabrika
Director: Salem Kapińá-KantardŇĺińá
Story: Brano Jakubovińá, Vedran Mujagińá
Producer: Perla Ovadija Mosca
Director of Photography: Almir ńźikoli
Editing: Antonio Ilińá
Concept Art (Vechicle): Midhat Kapetanovińá
3D Modelling and CGI: Adnan Peco and Salem Kapińá-KantardŇĺińá
Costume design: Lejla Ramińá and Glamur dizajn
Make up: Maja Talovińá
Space vehicle makers: Vahid Mujevińá i Ahmet Sadiki-ńĆelo

Cast: Mirza Tanovińá, Almir Hasanbegovińá, Adis Zvekińá, Brano Jakubovińá, Vedran Mujagińá, Jernej Ň†avel, Dragan Jakubovińá, Enes Vilińá, Adis Sadikovińá, Aleksandar Macanovińá, Adnan KaradŇĺa, Ado Gojak, Elias Kadrińá, Ň†kiljo Zijad, Mirel Kadrińá, Enver Imamovińá, Hariz Botińá, Emir Bajnińá, Omar ńÜosińá, Jasmin Smailbegovińá, Adnan Velińá, Salko Trebo, Anel Mlivińá, Kerim Ormańá.

Special thanks to workers and management of Rudnik mrkog uglja Breza and JoŇĺe "Dodo" GlaŇĺar

Shop - http://shop.dubioza.org 
Web - http://dubioza.org 
Facebook - http://facebook.com/dubioza
Twitter - http://twitter.com/dubiozakolektiv
Instagram - http://instagram.com/dubiozagram
Youtube - http://youtube.com/dubiozaTV
‚úĒ SUBSCRIBE: http://bit.ly/5u85cr183

Lyrics:

If you put it like that
It ain‚Äôt so funny 
Everybody here just 
Running for the money 
And on the streets 
Beggars, junkies
We didn‚Äôt learn a thing 
Since we were monkeys
Never-ending wars
Screaming and fighting 
Thousands of people disappeared 
Still counting
Fake news?
No, no, don‚Äôt believe them
Just wanna runaway to freedom

I‚Äôm gonna leave this place 
Going outer space
I‚Äôll be a refugee
In different galaxy

When you put it like that 
It ain‚Äôt so funny 
Everyday I feel like
A crash-test dummy 
Time is running
I try to cope 
Starting to wonder 
Is there any hope
All around the world 
Ignorance is striking 
Doomsday clock
Three minutes and counting 
Fake news?
No, no don‚Äôt believe them
Just wanna runaway to freedom

I‚Äôm gonna leave this place 
Going outer space
I‚Äôll be a refugee
In different galaxy

#BOSA #bosniansinspace #moonever15

snippet.title: Popov - NA TIńÜU ūü§ę (Official Video) Prod. by Popov
snippet.description:
Contact: zedgeneracija@gmail.com

Music: Popov
Text: Popov, Nucci
Arrangement: Popov
Mix & Master: Popov
Back vocal: Andrea Aleksic

Video: Tsunami production 
Written & creative dir by: Popov
Shot & edited by: Marko Panic

Popov: https://www.instagram.com/jelovopopov
Nucci: https://www.instagram.com/nucciovde
Marko Panic: https://www.instagram.com/markopaanic
Tsunami: https://www.instagram.com/tsunamivids

TEKST:
Strofa 1:
guzu lupim joj, ko da je komad moj
nek ne brine se tvoj sto sad oblio te znoj
cikago il Detroit u avionu Moet
pa smota mi taj dzoint i pogledom me opije
 
ona samo gori, pun klub je
ostavi se njega, vidis glup je
posle zurke vodim te u kupe
rekla je da hoce sve na kub je

dobra, njna koza meni uvek tako dobra
na ziku moju uvija ko kobra 
i kaze hoce sve, hoce odma
da proba me

Bridz:
nemoj da pricas
nemoj, nema da pricas, nikom
nemoj da pricas
nemoj, nema da pricas ne

Moze bebi al samo na 

Ref:
ticu ticu ticu samo na

ticu ticu ticu samo na 
ticu ticu ticu samo na 
ticu samo na ticu

Strofa 2:
ispomerana lezi tu u mome krevetu
skine sve sa sebe tu je vec noc devetu
i nema sanse da skines parfem
miris jak je, znace da ga lazes

volim kad me zove papi je
volim kad se vodke napije
volim kad me zove tatice
volim kad se vide gacice

ma neka traje 
ma neka traje 
ma nek se daje e e
(tatice)
tags: sve moze bebi al samo na ticu

snippet.title: Yemin 341. B√∂l√ľm FragmanńĪ | The Promise Season 3 Episode 341 Promo
snippet.description:
Abone olun / Subscribe / Suscr√≠bete: https://bit.ly/2VWzKrR

When Mr Hikmet is given a terminal diagnosis he wonders what will become of the fortune he has worked so hard to amass - he can't leave everything to his frivolous son Emir. He travels to see Reyhan, the daughter of an old family friend. She is a kind and caring girl and Hikmet has her promise to marry Emir, securing a stable future for the family. But Emir makes his own promise - to punish his father for controlling his life he will treat Reyhan so badly that she is forced to leave him.

#Yemin
#ThePromise

snippet.title: Eurovision Song Contest 2021 - Grand Final - Live Stream
snippet.description:
The Grand Final of the Eurovision Song Contest 2021 will take place on 22 May. 26 Acts will perform in the final of which 6 countries are already pre-qualified. This are host country The Netherlands and the so called 'Big 5' consisting of France, Germany, Italy, Spain and the United Kingdom. Ten acts will qualify from the first-Semi-Final and the remaining ten acts will qualify from the Second Semi-Final. 

-

If you want to know more about the Eurovision Song Contest, visit https://eurovision.tv

Shop the official Eurovision Song Contest merchandise: https://shop.eurovision.tv/
Follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/eurovision 
Follow us on Twitter: https://twitter.com/Eurovision
Follow us on Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/EurovisionSongContest/

snippet.title: Friends: The Reunion | Official Trailer | HBO Max
snippet.description:
Our favorite friends are back on the set that started it all. Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow, Matt LeBlanc, Matthew Perry, David Schwimmer, and special guests reunite to discuss everything from their casting process to whether or not Ross and Rachel were really on a break. Witness the unbreakable bond of the group that perfectly captured the moment in life when your friends become your family.

Stream Friends: The Reunion May 27 on HBO Max. 

Subscribe: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxYouTube
Be the first to know more:
HBO Max: https://hbom.ax/YT
Like HBO Max on Facebook: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxFacebook
Follow HBO Max on Twitter: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxTwitter
Follow HBO Max on Instagram: http://bit.ly/HBOMaxInstagram

HBO Max is WarnerMedia‚Äôs direct-to-consumer offering with 10,000 hours of curated premium content. HBO Max offers powerhouse programming for everyone in the home, bringing together HBO, a robust slate of new original series, key third-party licensed programs and movies, and fan favorites from WarnerMedia‚Äôs rich library including Warner Bros., New Line, DC, CNN, TNT, TBS, truTV, Turner Classic Movies, Cartoon Network, Adult Swim, Crunchyroll, Rooster Teeth, Looney Tunes and more. #HBOMax #WarnerMedia

snippet.title: Na VlaŇ°ińáu snijeg zameo ovńćarska stada
snippet.description:
Od sinońá pada snijeg na planini VlaŇ°ińá. Jutros smo posjetili lokalitet Galice,
i Deveńćana a najteŇĺa situacija za stońćare je na Releju, Ň†antińáu, Kraljici. Mnoga stada su ostala bez hrane. Na Galici smo razgovarali sa Vahidom Rubanovińáem, sinom od  Brice koji je nastavio ońćev zanat. KaŇĺe da se on s ovcama spustio na Galicu jer na tom dijelu VlaŇ°ińáa ne pada puno snijega a ovce mogu pronańái i neku travku. Kako je jutros izgledalo na VlaŇ°ińáu pogledajte u ovoj video prińći.
PridruŇĺite se tom kanalu da biste dobili pristup pogodnostima:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIu6gtFVDK1u93irvvVrD2A/join

snippet.title: Yemin 339. B√∂l√ľm FragmanńĪ | The Promise Season 3 Episode 339 Promo
snippet.description:
Abone olun / Subscribe / Suscr√≠bete: https://bit.ly/2VWzKrR

When Mr Hikmet is given a terminal diagnosis he wonders what will become of the fortune he has worked so hard to amass - he can't leave everything to his frivolous son Emir. He travels to see Reyhan, the daughter of an old family friend. She is a kind and caring girl and Hikmet has her promise to marry Emir, securing a stable future for the family. But Emir makes his own promise - to punish his father for controlling his life he will treat Reyhan so badly that she is forced to leave him.

#Yemin

snippet.title: Ruski specijalci stigli u Srbiju ‚ÄĒ pońćele antiteroristińćke vojne veŇĺbe ‚ÄěZajednińćki odgovor 2021‚Äú
snippet.description:
U Srbiji su pońćele antiteroristińćke vojne veŇĺbe ruske i srpske vojske ‚ÄěZajednińćki odgovor 2021‚Äú, koje ńáe trajati do 25. maja. U njima uńćestvuju jedinice za specijalne operacije Srbije i Rusije.

U vojnim veŇĺbama uńćestvuje 200 ruskih vojnika i 11 jedinica vojne tehnike Zapadnog vojnog okruga.

Na vojnim manevrima se veŇĺba desant, uz pomońá padobranskih sistema ‚ÄěArbalet‚Äú, napredovanje ka objektu nezakonitih vojnih formacija, njegovo blokiranje i uniŇ°tenje. Pored toga, izvodińáe se gańĎanja iz malokalibarskog oruŇĺja.

Na ceremoniji otvaranja, strane su istakle znańćaj zajednińćkih aktivnosti borbene obuke za razvoj saradnje oruŇĺanih snaga Srbije i Rusije na polju borbe protiv terorizma.

Za sve najvaŇĺnije vesti, komentare i analize posetite naŇ° sajt ‚Ėļ https://rs.sputniknews.com/

U moru informacija treba izabrati pravu.

hr.title: Novi kostimi za Dianu i navijańćice! | Cijela Ň°kola je u Ň°oku!
hr.description:
Diana je naruńćila nove kostime navijańćica kako bi iznenadila cijelu Ň°kolu. Diana je to uńćinila, svi djeńćaci u Ň°koli pali su na njih. No, Ň°kolskim kolegama se to nije svidjelo i Ňĺele napisati pismo ravnatelju. Je li Diana naruńćila dobra odijela? a Ň°to ńáe redatelj uńćiniti s navijańćicom? Pogledajte ovu seriju!
Pretplatite se na kanal! ūüĎ©‚ÄćūüĎ©‚ÄćūüĎ¶‚ÄćūüĎ¶
